title: Chinas Coal Imports From Australia Have Set Another Three Year High Imports From Mongolia Have Set A Record
section_path: Chinas Coal Imports From Australia Have Set Another Three Year High Imports From Mongolia Have Set A Record
section_path_text: Chinas Coal Imports From Australia Have Set Another Three Year High Imports From Mongolia Have Set A Record
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
Indonesia and Russia have remained China's primary sources of coal imports, and imports from Australia have set another three-year high. Among the major exporters, of note is that August most recently saw China's coal imports from Indonesia total 18.7 million tons. This is up from July by 2.9 million tons (18%) and is also up year-on-year by 2.9 million tons (18%).
